constructs.instructions_verbatim: In the lexical decision task (LDT), participants are presented with a string of letters (either a word or a nonword ...), and are asked to press one button if the string is a word and another button if the string is a nonword...
constructs.citation: Balota, D. A., et al. (2007). The English Lexicon Project. Behavior Research Methods, 39, 445-459.
constructs.instructions_llm: Imagine seeing this letter string and judging whether it is a real English word as quickly and accurately as possible. Estimate the reaction time in milliseconds. Reply with one number.

constructs.instructions_verbatim: In the speeded naming task, participants see a visual word ... and are asked to name the word aloud as quickly and as accurately as possible.
constructs.citation: Balota, D. A., et al. (2007). The English Lexicon Project. Behavior Research Methods, 39, 445-459.
constructs.instructions_llm: Imagine seeing this word and reading it aloud as quickly and accurately as possible. Estimate the naming latency in milliseconds. Reply with one number.
